Ntc Of Petition To Compel Arbitration And Stay Action; Req. For Judicial Ntc And Appendix Of Non-Calif Authorities
Off Calendar Sep-27-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
DEFENDANTS ALLISON MCCLAIN, KAISER FOUNDATION HEALTH PLAN, INC., THE PERMANENTE MEDICAL GROUP, INC. and KAISER FOUNDATION HOSPITALS' Petition To Compel Arbitration And Stay Action. Arbitration is compelled as to claims brought as decedent's successor, but not as to fraud claim. The entire case is stayed pending the outcome of arbitration. DEFENDANT'S COUNSEL TO PREPARE ORDER. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR #8189 =(301/PJB/LB)
